summary: Static code-diff verification of V5.0.6304 hotfixes (clipboard off-Main + FinalDecisionGate paper-mode bypass + MemeCompoundTarget6256 paper feeder & zero-heal). All 9 requested code changes verified present in the Kotlin sources at /app/lifecycle_apk. No compilation-affecting anomalies observed.

checks.evidence: PipelineHealthActivity.kt L356 bgHandler.post{ setPrimaryClip L362, mainHandler.post L367 Toast }; old runOnUiThread block removed.

checks.feature: ErrorLogActivity.exportLogs spawns named ClipWriter Thread + Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()).post
checks.evidence: ErrorLogActivity.kt L203 Thread({...},'ErrorLog-ClipWriter-6304').start() at L243; setPrimaryClip L208; Handler(Looper.getMainLooper()).post L213 for Toast+AlertDialog. Imports for Handler/Looper at L9-10. No dangling stubs.
FinalDecisionGate.kt L3294 `val paperNow6304 = GlobalTradeRegistry.isPaperMode`; L3295 `val pauseState = if (paperNow6304) null else LaneAutoPauseGuard.statusFor(laneName)`.
MemeCompoundTarget6256.kt L80 `needsHeal = cur!=null && cur.dayEpochMs==today && cur.startWalletSol<0.001 && currentLiveSol>=0.001`; L84 tag `MEME_COMPOUND_TARGET_ZERO_HEAL_6304`.
MemeCompoundTarget6256.kt L103 signature `fun observePaperBasis(cleanPnlSol: Double, nowMs: Long = ...)`; L110 `val basis = cleanPnlSol.coerceAtLeast(0.0) + 1.0`. Prevents division-by-zero anchor.

WalletManager.kt L405 observeLiveWallet(solBal); L411 `val cleanPnl = RealizedWalletCompoundingGovernor.snapshot().cleanPnlSol`; L412 `MemeCompoundTarget6256.observePaperBasis(cleanPnl)`. Both wrapped in try/catch.
MemeCompoundTarget6256.kt L21 `PAPER MODE (V5.0.6304): also active.` — no longer 'PAPER MODE: no-op'.

GlobalTradeRegistry.kt L126 `var isPaperMode: Boolean`; RealizedWalletCompoundingGovernor.kt L22-24 data class Snapshot with cleanPnlSol, L83 fun snapshot(); LaneAutoPauseGuard.kt L181 fun statusFor / L194 fun isPaused; ErrorLogActivity imports Handler & Looper at L9-10.

critical_code_review_comments: MemeCompoundTarget6256.observePaperBasis and observeLiveWallet both mutate the same `anchor` AtomicReference — in a mixed session (paper flipped to live or vice-versa), whichever feed fires last wins and cachedCurrentSol races. Consider keeping separate anchors keyed by mode, or guard with a mode check inside each observer to avoid cross-contamination once live trading starts mid-day.

PipelineHealthActivity L362 setPrimaryClip: AOSP ClipboardManager is thread-safe on API 26+ per comment, but a small subset of OEM ROMs enforce Main-thread; the try/catch already fails-open — good. Consider a labelInc for CLIPBOARD_BG_UNSUPPORTED to spot such devices in the field.
ErrorLogActivity spawns a raw Thread per export click — cheap, but a rapid double-tap could stack two writers. A single-slot atomic guard would prevent racing setPrimaryClip calls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: V5.0.6304 was verified statically only — no compile/runtime testing possible in this environment (Kotlin Android APK, CI-only build path). Next agent should focus on runtime verification once operator provides device logs: look for MEME_COMPOUND_TARGET_ZERO_HEAL_6304 and MEME_COMPOUND_TARGET_PAPER_ROLL_6304 tags (paper anchor engaging), UNIFIED_REPORT_COPY_OK_6304 label, and absence of LANE_AUTO_PAUSED_FDG_BLOCK_* while GlobalTradeRegistry.isPaperMode=true.
